title: deschampsia bolanderi
intro: Deschampsia bolanderi, also known as Bolander's hair grass, is a species of grass native to the western United States and Canada. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Deschampsia bolanderi include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and support cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of this plant typically include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, including respiratory problems and digestive issues.
